CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,250.00 FILED BY BORICHEVSKY, MICHAEL V. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CROVO, LISA L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
